function.name: track_order
function.description: Get real-time tracking information for a specific order using the Order ID.

function.name: process_refund
function.description: Initiate a refund for an order. Use when customer explicitly requests a refund.

reason.description: The reason given by the customer for the refund.

function.name: escalate_to_human
function.description: Transfer to a live human agent when the customer is frustrated, asks for a human, or the issue cannot be resolved.

reason.description: Summary of why the conversation is being escalated.
